message:
fix(discord): reject malformed embeds with typed InvalidRequest

Replaces silent `serde_json::from_value(...).ok()` on the embeds input
in both send_message and edit_message with a shared `parse_embeds`
helper that surfaces deserialization failures as
FcpError::InvalidRequest { code: 1003 } and names the `embeds` field.

Previously, a malformed embeds payload fell through to the generic
"content or embeds required" branch on send, and bypassed embed
validation entirely on edit (the edit proceeded as if no embeds had
been supplied, silently clobbering agent intent).

Adds two integration regression tests covering wrong-shape embeds on
both paths.

Refs: flywheel_connectors-cmkuk

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
